SourceProxy.name: DetectedClusterUDPSender
SourceProxy.label: Detected Cluster UDP Sender
SourceProxy.Documentation: Send MotionDetector cluster info (such as center position, distance, label and size) over network in UDP.

IntVectorProperty.name: EnableDataTransmission
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Enable/disable this filter. When disabled, this filter passes data object doing nothing more.

StringVectorProperty.name: IPAddress
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: IP address to send data over. Can either be a IPv4 address string in dotted decimal form, or an IPv6 address in hexadecimal notation.

IntVectorProperty.name: DestinationPort
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Port on which to send data.
